# YourGP@Denman

> General practice in Denman Prospect, Canberra — Genuine Care, Clinical Excellence.

YourGP@Denman is a 9-room general practice located in a Distribution Priority Area (DPA) in Denman Prospect, a suburb of Canberra in the Australian Capital Territory. Part of the YourGP network of independent practices (Crace, Denman Prospect, and Lyneham), it offers comprehensive general practice services including skin cancer checks, minor procedures, chronic disease management, and preventive care. The practice is AGPAL accredited and is a teaching practice affiliated with the Australian National University. YourGP is actively recruiting GPs, nurses, and admin team members across all three clinics (33 consulting rooms, 30,000+ patients per year).

## Key Information

- **Address**: Level 1, 1B Felstead Vista, Denman Prospect ACT 2611
- **Phone**: (02) 6109 0000
- **Hours**: Monday to Friday 8:00am–5:00pm
- **Booking**: Online via [HotDoc](https://www.hotdoc.com.au/medical-centres/fisher-ACT-2611/yourgp-denman/doctors) or by phone
- **Billing**: Private billing. Medicare rebates processed on the day. Not bulk billed.
- **New patients**: Welcome
- **After hours**: CALMS (1300 422 567) or Healthdirect (1800 022 222)

## Services

- Children's Health and Childhood Immunisations
- Chronic Disease Management (cardiovascular disease, type 2 diabetes, osteoarthritis, chronic kidney disease, autoimmune diseases)
- Driver's Medicals
- Men's Health
- Mental Health (care plans, referrals to psychologists)
- Minor Procedures (implanon, IUD insertion, skin cancer removal, ingrown toenails, tongue tie)
- Musculoskeletal
- Travel Vaccinations (including yellow fever)
- Skin Checks (Dr Chi So — specialist skin cancer GP)
- Vasectomy (Dr John Deery — see canberravasectomy.com.au)
- Women's Health (pap smears, contraception, antenatal and postnatal care, lactation medicine)
- Workers Compensation
- Allied Health: 4Cyte Pathology on-site, nursing services

## Sister Practices

- [YourGP@Crace](https://www.yourgpcrace.com.au) — 1/5 Baratta Street, Crace ACT 2911
- [YourGP@Lyneham](https://www.yourgplyneham.com.au) — 62 Brigalow St, Lyneham ACT 2602

## Specialist Clinics

- [Canberra Vasectomy](https://www.canberravasectomy.com.au) — Dr John Deery, no-scalpel vasectomy
- [YourSkinCBR](https://www.yourskincbr.com.au) — Skin cancer specialist GPs at Crace and Denman

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.yourgpdenman.com.au/): Welcome, practice philosophy, opening hours, locations map
- [Doctors](https://www.yourgpdenman.com.au/doctors/): GP profiles, qualifications, special interests, availability
- [Services](https://www.yourgpdenman.com.au/services/): Full list of clinical services and allied health
- [New Patient](https://www.yourgpdenman.com.au/patient/): New patient information, forms, fees, after hours care
- [FAQ](https://www.yourgpdenman.com.au/faq/): Billing, appointments, parking, results, privacy policy
- [Contact](https://www.yourgpdenman.com.au/contact/): Contact form, feedback, directions
- [Careers](https://www.yourgpdenman.com.au/careers/): GP, nursing, and admin team recruitment
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.yourgpdenman.com.au/privacy-policy/): Full privacy policy
